services.title: Services I Offer
services.subtitle: Digital solutions designed to increase authority, conversion, and business growth

frontend.title: Front-end Developer
frontend.description: Modern responsive interfaces focused on user experience, performance, and conversion.
modalItems: Professional interface development aligned with your business goals.
Responsive design for desktop, tablet, and mobile with consistent usability.
Technical SEO-ready structure to improve organic reach and brand discoverability.
Refactoring and optimization of existing pages to improve performance and conversion rates.

backend.title: Back-end Development
backend.description: Robust back-end engineering to deliver security, scalability, and reliability.
modalItems: Stable, well-structured RESTful API development built for long-term evolution.
Data modeling and integration with relational and non-relational databases based on project needs.
Secure authentication, authorization, and route protection using best practices.
Performance optimization to reduce infrastructure costs and improve reliability.

fullstack.title: Full Stack Developer
fullstack.description: End-to-end execution that accelerates delivery and turns ideas into real products.
modalItems: End-to-end planning and development of web applications focused on business outcomes.
Technical architecture designed for maintainability, scalability, and faster delivery.
Seamless front-end and back-end integration for a consistent user experience.
Deployment, monitoring, and continuous maintenance to keep products stable and competitive.

testimonials.title: What they say
testimonials.subtitle: About me?
testimonials.description: Real outcomes from clients who trusted my work
testimonials.text1: I hired Yago to build our landing page and was impressed by his speed, organization, and quality. The final result strengthened our digital presence and gave our team more confidence to sell.
testimonials.text2: Excellent service from start to finish. Yago translated my requirements into a practical and professional solution, with clear communication throughout the project. Highly recommended.
testimonials.text3: Yago quickly understood our business goals and delivered a technical solution with strategic thinking. The project improved our lead generation process and strengthened our brand positioning.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: I turn ideas into digital products that drive real results
about.description: I'm a Full Stack developer helping companies and professionals build modern, scalable digital experiences focused on conversion.
highlights: Performance, conversion, and user experience as product priorities.
Clean, scalable architecture designed for long-term growth.
Clear communication and delivery with a business mindset.

bio.suffix: . I combine strategy, design, and code to deliver practical impact: stronger digital authority, better user experience, and more business opportunities.

telegas.title: TeleGás Monte Verde
telegas.subtitle: Commercial Landing Page
telegas.description: I built a strategic landing page for a gas distributor in Betim-MG with a clear conversion focus. The project combines local SEO, action-driven copy, and fast contact paths to improve lead generation.

togyro.title: Togyro Group Victory
togyro.subtitle: Corporate Portfolio
togyro.description: I created an institutional website with a futuristic visual identity for a technology company. It blends smooth motion, responsive UX, and scalable architecture to reinforce digital brand authority.

kypy.title: Kypy Health
kypy.subtitle: Clinic Landing Page
kypy.description: I structured Kypy clinic's digital presence with a strong focus on service clarity and trust. The solution improves user flow, highlights treatments, and strengthens conversion opportunities.

ecosempre.title: EcoSempre Project
ecosempre.subtitle: Environmental Platform
ecosempre.description: I built an educational platform about proper e-waste disposal with a didactic user experience. It combines interactive sections, practical guidance, and social-impact-oriented content architecture.

teamblack.title: TeamBlack
teamblack.subtitle: Educational Site
teamblack.description: I developed an institutional website for an educator with professional positioning and clear communication. It features course showcases, social proof, and integrated contact channels.

todolist.title: To-Do List
todolist.subtitle: Web Application
todolist.description: I built a productivity web app with full task CRUD and localStorage persistence. The product prioritizes usability, smooth interaction, and practical day-to-day organization.

gt.title: GT Personal Trainer
gt.subtitle: Fitness Site
gt.description: I created a commercial website for a personal trainer with clear value proposition, social proof, and strategic CTAs. The design was built to boost lead generation and personal brand strength.

phbytes.title: Ph Bytes
phbytes.subtitle: Technology Portfolio
phbytes.description: I developed an institutional website for a tech company with a positioning-first approach. Service architecture, portfolio storytelling, and contact flow were designed to attract qualified opportunities.

bodegueira.title: Bodegueira Charcutaria & Cia
bodegueira.subtitle: Food E-commerce
bodegueira.description: I developed a delivery e-commerce experience for Bodegueira in Brasília with a sales-first approach. The implementation includes product showcase, ordering flow, and WhatsApp integration to reduce friction.

lacos.title: Laços e Confeitos
lacos.subtitle: Confectionery Site
lacos.description: I developed a confectionery website with a premium visual identity and strong commercial intent. The experience highlights products, supports quote requests, and reinforces brand quality perception.

raha.title: Raha Health and Aesthetics
raha.subtitle: Clinic Site
raha.description: I built a health and aesthetics clinic website with strategic service communication and clean UX. The project enhances trust, brand positioning, and conversion through better contact pathways.

vivacqua.title: Vivacqua Dentistry
vivacqua.subtitle: Corporate Website
vivacqua.description: I developed a corporate dental website with a strong technical foundation. The solution combines semantic HTML, responsive design, accessibility, and performance best practices to improve visibility and credibility.

togyrostore.title: TogyroStore
togyrostore.subtitle: SaaS Platform
togyrostore.description: A Ruby on Rails SaaS platform that enables businesses to launch stores, landing pages, and delivery operations quickly. It was designed for scalable growth with centralized management.

upcoming.title: New Projects

upcoming.description: New case studies are currently in development, focused on performance, UX, and business outcomes. More strategic projects will be published here soon.
